def solve(s, k)
  result = []
  s.each_char do |c|
    if c == '#'
      result += result
    elsif c == '%'
      result.reverse!
    elsif c == '*'
      result.pop if result.any?
    else
      result << c
    end
  end
  result.length > k ? result[k] : '.'
end

def solve(s, k)
  result = []
  s.each_char do |c|
    if c == '#'
      result += result
    elsif c == '%'
      result.reverse!
    elsif c == '*'
      result.pop if result.any?
    else
      result << c
    end
  end
  result.length > k ? result[k] : '.'
end
